## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo build --release` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] New strategies are added to `default_catalogue()` and documented in the README
- [ ] No code that attacks/probes third-party servers beyond a normal client connection
